name: Reykjanes Ridge
description: The Soviet SSN group that has been tracking your carrier group has been ordered to close. Stop them.
briefing:
CLASSIFICATION: SECRET -- FLASH

TO: Commander, Patrol Group DELTA
FROM: CVN-68 NIMITZ COMBAT CONTROL
DTG: 220600Z NOV 1985

We have a problem.

Fleet tracking shows two confirmed and one probable hostile SSN closing on the battle group from the east.

Estimated time to weapons release range: 45 minutes.

A coordinated torpedo salvo at this range saturates our screen. The carrier does not maneuver. Your screen does.

Your assets are all that stand between them and the flight deck.

Jacksonville has not confirmed the third contact. She may be inside its detection envelope. Assume she is.

One mistake here costs a flight deck and everyone on it.

Weapons free inside the screen perimeter. Kill them all.
